name: Build queue message
Build ready message
Setup required
info:
Before deploying, configure the following nodes:

1. Both 'mqtt in' nodes: select your MQTT broker
2. 'POST to speaker display' node:
   - Set URL to: http://<your-speaker-ip>/config/rest/speaker-display-notification/v1/simple
   - Set username and password for the Axis device

label: Queue Display
info:
Displays restaurant queue and ready tickets on an Axis Display Speaker.

Subscribes to:
  restaurant/queue  ->  list of orders being prepared
  restaurant/ready  ->  list of orders ready for pickup

Posts to the VAPIX Speaker Display Notification API on the speaker.
Ready alert shows for 8 seconds then reverts to queue view.
